D:\Programs\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\DES_test.dir/objects.a
D:\Programs\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\DES_test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\DES_test.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Programs\MSYS2\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\DES_test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o DES_test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libDES_test.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\DES_test.dir\linkLibs.rsp
